title: ononis variegata f. oranensis
intro: Ononis variegata f. oranensis, also known as the Algerian spiny restharrow, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Ononis variegata f. oranensis can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
